name: Crisis Communications Simulation
description: Predict public reaction to a crisis event and evaluate communication strategy effectiveness
default_requirement: Simulate public reaction to this crisis over 14 days. Focus on social media sentiment, media coverage patterns, stakeholder trust, and effectiveness of crisis response messaging.
system_prompt_addition: Focus on crisis lifecycle dynamics: initial shock, information vacuum, narrative formation, blame attribution, and recovery trajectory. Track how different communication strategies affect public trust and sentiment.
